chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 1615 of 2017 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 22.01.2018 For orders on MA 164/18 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi Mr. Hussain Bux Solangi, advocate for petitioner Mr. Ghulam Abbas Sangi, Asstt: A.G. Learned counsel for petitioner states that he will be satisfied if learned A.A.G. gives undertaking that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law. Learned A.A.G. present in court in other matters waives notice and gives such undertaking. Learned counsel for petitioner being satisfied with the undertaking does not press this petition any further which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
